title: Show follower lists and counts publicly to all users

requirements.text: Expose a public backend query that returns the list of followers for any given user principal, callable without authentication.

quotes: I want everyone to see their followers

acceptanceCriteria: An unauthenticated (anonymous) caller can query the followers of any user principal.
The returned list contains the principals of all users who follow the specified user.
Existing follow/unfollow logic is not changed.

requirements.text: In UserProfileView, display the follower count as a clickable element. When clicked, open a modal or popover listing the display names (or principal-derived fallback) of all followers of that profile, visible to all visitors including unauthenticated users.

quotes: I want everyone to see their followers

acceptanceCriteria: The follower count is visible on every user's profile page for all visitors (logged in or not).
Clicking the follower count opens a list showing each follower's display name.
The followers list is fetched using the public backend query from REQ-1.
The list is accessible on both the current user's own profile and other users' profiles.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all existing follow/unfollow functionality and access control logic.
nonGoals: Changing the following list visibility (only followers list is in scope).
Adding pagination to the followers list.
Any changes to the messaging or content upload features.
